definition: Metadata supporting management access preservation and rights.
Metadata describing technical format encoding schema or system context.
Record of origin history and transformation.
Record of how data moves and changes through a system.
Ability to follow inputs processes outputs and decisions across time.
Structured record of actions events actors objects and timestamps.
A stable value used to refer to an object.
A recorded time for creation modification access processing or publication.
Tracking states of data code models schemas or outputs.
Rules defining fields types constraints and relationships.
A compact value used to detect change or corruption.
Documented handling of evidence across time.
Ability to recreate or explain a result from documented inputs code environment and parameters.
Responsibility for maintaining data metadata and trace quality.
